name: Onboarding Professional Services Opal Integration Consultant
description: Onboarding training program for Professional Services Staff to learn Opal Integration Implementation

items.mentorTopic: Roles and responsibilities of an Opal Integration Consultant

items.textContent: The above link provides access to the Altera Internal Environments Access Guide document. It contains all required environment URLs along with their respective usage (PS, Sales, and R&D teams) and important access instructions, including the mandatory VPN (azaus-vpn) connection.

questions.text: 1. What is the name of the VPN required to access the internal environments?
2. Which environment is used by the PS team for training or testing?
3. Which of the following modules is available in all environments listed?
4. What should you do if you cannot access internal links?
5. Which of the following statements is CORRECT regarding access and usage of the environments?

options.text: A. The GA Web Environment can be used by the Sales team for client demonstrations if VPN is connected
B. All environments can be accessed without VPN if the correct URL is used
C. The APAC PS Environment should only be used by the PS team for training or testing purposes
D. The DMR Capture Endpoint requires HTTPS access in all environments

items.textContent:
High level overview of:
 
Servers available: Web, Doc, Message, DB server(s), Bulk Print 
IIS applications (Web server) 
Purpose of each server 
Services configured on the servers 

Document is uploded to the below given URL

questions.text: 1. What is the primary purpose of using a multi-tier architecture in the system?

options.text: A. To reduce the number of servers
B. To combine all services into one server
C. To distribute responsibilities across dedicated servers
D. To eliminate the need for databases

questions.text: 2. Which of the following is NOT a server type mentioned in the system?
3. Which server is responsible for hosting OPAL web applications and APIs?
4. What is the role of the Authentication Module in the Web Server?

options.text: D. Handling user authentication and session management

questions.text: 5. Which service is responsible for secure communication between users and the Web Server?
6. Which server handles document storage, retrieval, and scanning operations?
7. What is the primary function of the Messaging Server?

options.text: A. Communication between systems and message processing

questions.text: 8. Which service is responsible for handling inbound messaging in the system?
9. A failure occurs in the “DMRExternalImporter” process, causing external client systems to stop sending documents into OPAL. Based on the architecture, which server is MOST directly impacted?

options.text: A. Web Server, because it hosts OPAL APIs used for external communication
B. Document Server, because it handles external importer processes for file ingestion
C. Messaging Server, because it manages system-to-system communication
D. Database Server, because it stores all structured data

questions.text: 10. A system administrator notices that outbound messages from OPAL are not being delivered to external systems. Based on the architecture, which service failure is MOST likely responsible?

options.text: A. Opal – Inbound Fax service on Document Server
B. Opal – Trigger Management service on Messaging Server
C. Opal – DBAPI service on Document Server
D. SQL Server Agent (OPAL) on Database Server

items.textContent:
Overview of :
Opal client web application:  
Patient Desktop, Digital Medical Record (DMR) 
DMR Scanning 
DMR Search 
Web Outcomes 

Opal desktop application:  
DMRCapture 
eForms: viewing submitted eForms in DMR

questions.text: 1. What is the primary purpose of the Patient Desktop Overview session in OPAL Web Application?

options.text: B. To explain patient care and record management features
D. To train on messaging services

questions.text: 2. Which OPAL application is used to search for patient records?
3. Which of the following identifiers can be used to search for a patient in OPAL?

options.text: C. Patient Name, MRN, and Date of Birth
D. Only Date of Birth and Address

questions.text: 4. What happens when a user clicks on a patient from the Patient List?

options.text: A. Clinical Record opens in structured view
D. System logs out user session

questions.text: 5. What type of information is available in the Results Review section?

options.text: C. Only doctor notes and prescriptions
D. Laboratory, imaging, and diagnostic results

questions.text: 1. What is the primary purpose of the OPAL Message Admin module?

options.text: B. Managing message flow (inbound and outbound)

questions.text: 2. Which component is used to trigger or resend outbound messages?
3. What does “Queued Outbound Documents” represent?

options.text: B. Messages waiting to be sent

questions.text: 4. Where can you monitor incoming messages into OPAL?
5. A user wants to check why a message has not yet been sent after being triggered. Where should they FIRST look?

options.text: C. Pending Queues – Queued Outbound Documents

questions.text: 6. A message has been processed but not visible in external systems. Which section would BEST confirm whether it completed outbound preparation?
7. If a user needs to identify failed incoming messages, which combination is MOST appropriate?
8. Which feature provides insights into message delays and processing time?
9. A system admin wants to understand which external systems are connected to OPAL and how messages flow between them. Where should they go?
10. What does the IM Dashboard primarily display?

options.text: B. Message status, volume, and latency

items.mentorTopic: Creating a New or Updating an HL7 Interface

questions.text: 1. What is the purpose of the External Importer (EI)? (Select all that apply)
2. HL7 messages are processed based on configurations stored in which table?
3. What does the 'Append' property do?
4. Which symbol represents HL7 components?
5. What does FixedText represent?
6. Which are valid operators in EI conditions? (Select all that apply)
7. What does <NOW> represent?
8. Which function removes extra spaces?
9. What is the purpose of PATIENTALTERNATEDATASTRING?
10. When the error 'No EI Template has been configured' occurs, what should you do?

options.text: B. Execute Fill EI Template script

questions.text: 11. Which properties control value fallback and caching? (Select all that apply)
12. What is the most likely cause of repeated HL7 message resending due to ACK issues?

options.text: A. Incorrect usage of TRIM function
D. Improper use of Append property

questions.text: 13. What keys needs to be used to run the specification file?
14. What does '%006' represent?
15. In Result Link Command creation, which elements are used? (Select all that apply)
16. Which functions are used for string manipulation? (Select all that apply)
17. Which are advanced extraction functions?
18. What can cause HL7 ACK issues? (Select all that apply)
19. Which property ensures that a value is only assigned if no previous value has been populated?
20. Which of the following functions is specifically used to map values using predefined OPAL lookup lists?
21. What does the status INTEGRATED: 1 | REASON: 0 indicate?
22. What is the meaning of REASON: 1?
23. Which process is responsible for external message importing?
24. What does REASON: 5 indicate?
25. What should you check if messages are delayed in processing?
26. A message shows INTEGRATED: 0 | REASON: 2. What is the most likely issue?

options.text: D. Message arrived out of sequence

questions.text: 27. Which of the following is the best first step when diagnosing REASON: 3 (patientStream -2)?
28. Which condition may cause both duplicate messages and out-of-order delivery?
29. Why is a successful ACK not always sufficient to confirm proper integration?

options.text: A. ACK only confirms receipt, not processing

questions.text: 30. A system shows increasing message backlog, high CPU usage, and delayed processing, but all services are running. What is the most likely root cause?
